news.t: Junk Bonds Have a ‘Fallen Angel' Problem
Are dividend ETFs like JEPI, DVY, FALN, and VYM worth it?
Best High-Yield Bond ETFs for Q2 2021

overview.description: The iShares Fallen Angels USD Bond ETF (FALN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market value weighted index of bonds that were rated investment grade at issuance, but later downgraded to sub-investment grade. FALN was launched on Jun 14, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
